function getCenteredPosition(size){const vw=window.innerWidth,vh=window.innerHeight;return{x:Math.max(0,Math.round((vw-size.w)/2)),y:Math.max(0,Math.round((vh-size.h)/2))};}function clampToViewport(p,size){const maxX=Math.max(0,window.innerWidth-size.w);const maxY=Math.max(0,window.innerHeight-size.h);return{x:Math.min(Math.max(0,p.x),maxX),y:Math.min(Math.max(0,p.y),maxY)};}function safeGet(key){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||"null");}catch{return null;}}function safeSet(key,value){try{localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(value));}catch{}}// Resolve icon path (change to match your asset pipeline)
function getIconUrl(icon){if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(icon))return icon;return`/icons/corporations/${icon}`;// e.g., “police.png”
}// Badge color by stock level
function badgeTone(stock){if(typeof stock!=="number")return"neutral";if(stock<=0)return"danger";if(stock<=5)return"warn";return"success";}export default CorporationsView;
